data.title: Japan Ministry of Defense's Air Self-Defense Force uses Box for cloud content mgmt. Close knowledge sharing enabled.
data.description: In Tokyo, Box, Inc. (NYSE: BOX) revealed that the Japan Ministry of Defense’s Air Self-Defense Force (ASDF) has opted for Box as its Intelligent Content Management (ICM) platform. This decision involves deploying Box for secure cloud content management and collaboration within its operations. Through Box, ASDF will facilitate secure information sharing internally and externally with affiliated agencies and partners, fostering enhanced knowledge exchange between units. The ASDF's selection of Box underscores the platform's significance in bolstering operational efficiency and secure information handling.

data.title: Newmont Corporation sold 29,213,186 shares of Orosur Mining Inc. at C$0.19 per share, totalling C$5,550,505.34.
data.description: Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, TSX: NGT, ASX: NEM, PNGX: NEM) has recently sold 29,213,186 common shares of Orosur Mining Inc. at a price of C$0.19 per share. The total gross proceeds from the transaction were C$5,550,505.34. Prior to the sale, Newmont held the same amount of shares.

data.title: DermRays unveils V10S - world's first men's at-home hair removal diode laser device. Major upgrade to Revive system.
data.description: Pleasanton, California, July 31, 2025 - DermRays, a prominent provider of professional at-home hair removal products, has introduced a significant enhancement to its Revive system. The company has also launched the V10S, which stands out as the world's initial 810nm diode laser tool tailored for male use.

data.title: General Dynamics Bath Iron Works receives contract for an extra DDG 51 destroyer from the U.S. Navy.
data.description: In Bath, Maine on July 31, 2025, General Dynamics Bath Iron Works, a division of General Dynamics (NYSE:GD), reported that the U.S. Navy has chosen to include another DDG 51 destroyer in the multi-year contract initiated in 2023. This decision signifies an important development in naval shipbuilding, showcasing the Navy's commitment to enhancing its fleet. The addition of this destroyer underscores the trust in General Dynamics Bath Iron Works and its capabilities in delivering vital naval vessels.
